description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dist_3phase_bus_fault, and is implemented by a call to dist_3phase_bus_fault. Use this API to apply a fault at a bus during dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dist_bus_fault(ibus, units, basekv, values)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of the bus at which the fault is to be placed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Units in which fault admittance or impedance is specified in values. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: basekv
parameters.description: Base voltage in kv used to calculate the per unit fault admittance if units is 2 or 3; ignored if units is 1. if basekv is specified as 0.0, the base voltage of bus ibus is used. (input; 0.0 by default).

values.description: real component of the complex fault admittance or impedance according to the value specified for UNITS (0.0 by default).
reactive component of the complex fault admittance or impedance according to the value specified for UNITS (-2.0E11 by default).
